entity.summary: Mantle-native hybrid decentralized exchange combining AMM V2/V3 liquidity with order-book trading and RWA-oriented market infrastructure for continuous low-slippage spot trading.
entity.notes: Current first-party Fluxion application identifies itself as a decentralized exchange on Mantle. DefiLlama independently describes Fluxion Network as an RWA-optimized native Mantle DEX combining AMM V2/V3 and order-book functionality and reports current TVL, fees, and DEX volume. HEI consolidates Fluxion and Fluxion Network source rows into one entity.

evidence.title: Fluxion official application
evidence.notes: Current first-party application endpoint is reachable and identifies Fluxion as a decentralized exchange on Mantle.

evidence.title: Fluxion Network metrics and protocol information
evidence.notes: Protocol registry identifies Fluxion Network as an RWA-optimized native DEX on Mantle combining AMM V2/V3 and order-book functionality and reports current TVL, fees, and DEX volume.

evidence.title: Fluxion DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: DEX candidate corpus independently identifies Fluxion and Fluxion Network source rows on Mantle; HEI consolidates them into one exchange entity.
